wp-content/plugins/abschussplan-hgmh/adm.description: Created bulk operations service with batch processing for large datasets. Includes bulk_update, bulk_delete, mass_assign_meldegruppe methods. All operations validate inputs, sanitize data, and process records in configurable batches (default 100, range 10-500) to prevent timeouts. Returns detailed results with success/failure counts and failed record IDs.

Created undo service with operation logging and state restoration. Supports all operation types (import, bulk_update, bulk_delete, mass_assign) with configurable 30-day retention. Includes get_records_snapshot for capturing state before operations, restore_deleted_record for re-inserting deleted records with original IDs, and comprehensive validation.
